description: Deed of release. Beautifully preserved. Location: Fustat. Dated: Thursday, 23 [...] 1329 Seleucid = 1017/18 CE. In which Shelomo b. Moshe b. Shelomo declares that he has no claims against Manṣūr b. Yisraʾel ha-Levi or against Yaʿīsh b. Avraham b. Yaʿīsh ha-Kohen. Witnessed by Yaʿaqov b. Yosef, Hiba b. Aharon, Faraḥ b. Muʾammal, Yosef b. Binyamin, Moshe b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Kohen, and Shelomo b. ʿAllūn. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
